summary: Iteration 182 testing complete: Planetary Stratigraphy + Quantum Mechanics features. All 39 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend tests verified: PlanetaryDepths page shows 4-layer cross-section with Jungian psyche tracking, QuantumField page shows 3 shadow sprites with rarity/distance/state. Fixed backend bug: Body(..., embed=True) missing on /api/quantum/tunnel and /api/quantum/entangle endpoints.
critical_code_review_comments: planetary.py correctly implements 4-layer system with frequencies: Crust(432Hz), Mantle(396Hz), Outer Core(285Hz), Hollow Earth(174Hz)
Jungian psyche states map correctly: persona(crust), shadow(mantle), anima(outer_core), self(hollow_earth)
Layer accessibility is properly gated by consciousness level (1-4)
quantum.py shadow sprites are deterministic (SHA256-seeded by user_id + hour window)
Shadow observation requires 50m proximity (haversine distance calculation)
Quantum tunneling requires consciousness level 2+ and costs Cosmic Dust
Entanglement bonds limited to 3 per user
Fixed: Added embed=True to Body() for /api/quantum/tunnel and /api/quantum/entangle endpoints
GET /api/planetary/frequency-map correctly does NOT require auth
All other planetary/quantum endpoints correctly require auth
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 182 Planetary Stratigraphy + Quantum Mechanics all working. Test user has: consciousness_level=1, xp=222, dust=158. At level 1, only Crust layer is accessible. Mantle/Outer Core/Hollow Earth require levels 2/3/4. Quantum Tunneling requires level 2+. Shadow sprites are procedurally generated near GPS coords with 50m observation radius. Entanglement bonds max 3 per user. Previous Activity Loop and Streak Heatmap features still working (regression verified).

backend_apis.GET /api/planetary/layers: Returns 4 layers with accessibility status based on consciousness level
backend_apis.GET /api/planetary/depth-status: Returns current_layer, psyche_state, psyche_info, unlocked_layers, descent_history
backend_apis.POST /api/planetary/descend: Descend to target layer (gated by consciousness level)
backend_apis.GET /api/quantum/shadows/nearby: Returns 3 shadow sprites with rarity, distance, state
backend_apis.GET /api/quantum/shadows/history: Returns collapsed shadow history with rarity breakdown
backend_apis.POST /api/quantum/tunnel: Quantum tunnel between layers (costs dust, requires level 2+)
backend_apis.GET /api/quantum/tunneling-costs: Returns cost table based on current position

bug_fixed.issue: POST /api/quantum/tunnel and POST /api/quantum/entangle returning 422 validation errors
bug_fixed.root_cause: Body(...) without embed=True expects raw string body, but frontend sends JSON object
bug_fixed.fix: Added embed=True to Body() parameters in quantum.py lines 283 and 409
